title: lithocarpus truncatus
intro: Lithocarpus truncatus, also known as the Taiwan corkwood or Taiwanese bur oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to Taiwan and China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids. The health benefits of Lithocarpus truncatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Lithocarpus truncatus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
